ticket.subject: Orders table missing 4,200 rows after last night's migration
ticket.body: We ran a routine migration around 02:30 UTC and our orders table is now showing 4,217 fewer rows than the snapshot from 02:00. Can you confirm whether PITR is available for the last 12 hours on our project? We need to recover the lost rows before customers notice missing receipts. This is a data-loss incident, not a bug report.
